party_a_address: Peterborough Court, 133 Fleet Street, London EC4A 2BB
party_a_accounts: As notified by Party A in writing
party_b_accounts: As notified by Party B in writing
fixed_payment_dates: 3rd day of March and September each year, commencing 03 September 2026, subject to Modified Following Business Day Convention
floating_payment_dates: 3rd day of March, June, September and December each year, commencing 03 June 2026, subject to Modified Following Business Day Convention
reset_dates: First day of each Calculation Period

custom_clauses.title: Business Day Convention
custom_clauses.description: Modified Following, with New York and London as the relevant Business Day centers for all payment and reset date calculations.

custom_clauses.title: Netting
custom_clauses.description: Payments due on the same date in the same currency shall be netted into a single payment obligation.
